name: Mushroom Crust Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a skillet and add mushrooms. Sauté until golden, about 10 minutes.
2. Stir in bread crumbs, then pat into a 9-inch pie pan or divide among eight 4-inch tart pans.
3. Combine cheeses and remaining ingredients; spoon into prepared crust.
4. Bake at 350 degrees for 35 to 45 minutes, until puffy and golden.
5. Cool about 10 minutes before serving. Makes one 9-inch pie.
